problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.
